'''Caridan''' was the name of the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] in the [[Carida system/Legends|Carida system]].<ref name="Wizards" /> When [[Kyp Durron]] was controlled by the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] Lord [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] and took control of the [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] [[Sun Crusher]], the star was shot with a [[resonance torpedo]]. Upon impact, the torpedo burrowed into the star's core releasing dense packets of energy that rendered the star's core unstable, initiating a chain-reaction [[Supernova/Legends|supernova]]. The star ripped itself apart in the explosion, sending waves of energy and [[Radiation/Legends|radiation]] out across the system, destroying every [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in its path.
